title: Account access failures after credential rollover
incident_summary: Customer sign-ins are being rejected shortly after a scheduled credential rollover window.

alerts.title: 401 rate spike
alerts.content: 401 responses rose from 1.2% to 24% in 10 minutes.

alerts.title: Login latency warning
alerts.content: P95 login latency increased by 120ms but stays below SLO burn threshold.

logs.title: JWT signer key expired
logs.content: token_issuer: signature key kid=2026-03 expired at 00:00 UTC

logs.title: Password reset retries
logs.content: password-reset worker retrying transient redis timeouts

logs.title: rate limiter warning
logs.content: Spike in unauthenticated probes triggered perimeter limiter but auth token path remained unaffected.

runbook_snippets.title: Auth signing key rotation
runbook_snippets.content: Rotate active signing key, reload token issuer deployment, and validate /jwks endpoint.

runbook_snippets.title: Rate-limit tuning
runbook_snippets.content: Adjust login brute-force threshold only when attack telemetry confirms malicious traffic.

timeline_notes.title: Key rotation cron failure
timeline_notes.content: Scheduled key rotation cron failed due to missing secret-manager permission.

red_herrings: Search API deploy completed 20 minutes earlier with no auth dependency changes.
true_root_cause: JWT signing key expired because rotation cron failed
true_mitigation: Rotate signing key and restart token issuer pods
true_mitigation_aliases: perform key rotation and reload auth issuer
rotate jwt key then restart auth service
